items.title: Ульянов раскрыл, когда российский персонал вернется на АЭС «Бушер»
items.summary: Российский персонал вернется на АЭС «Бушер» в кратчайшие сроки после стабилизации ситуации на Ближнем Востоке, заявил «Известиям» постпред России при международных организациях в Вене Михаил Ульянов.

items.title: Bloomberg узнал о планах США применить гиперзвуковую ракету против Ирана
items.summary: Американские военные запросили переброску гиперзвукового комплекса Dark Eagle на Ближний Восток, узнал Bloomberg. Этот шаг также рассматривается как сигнал стратегическим соперникам Вашингтона таким, как Россия и Китай

items.title: Breaking: WTI rises to near $105.00 as Trump maintains Iran naval blockade
items.summary: West Texas Intermediate (WTI), the US crude oil benchmark, is trading around $104.90 during the early Asian trading hours on Thursday.

items.title: US President Donald Trump vows to maintain Iran blockade, rejects Iran Hormuz offer
items.summary: US President Donald Trump said that the United States (US) will continue its naval blockade of Iran until he secures a deal with Tehran to address the country’s nuclear program, Bloomberg reported on Wednesday.

items.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average drops as Powell signs off: is $650B in AI capex the next risk?
items.summary: Wednesday's session had every excuse to rally. The Federal Reserve (Fed) decision was telegraphed. Big Tech earnings were teed up. The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) had reclaimed 49,000 just two days earlier.

items.title: Forex Today: US Dollar surges amid Fed's hawkish hold in Powell’s last meeting
items.summary: The US Dollar Index (DXY) is trading near the 99.00 price zone on Wednesday after the Federal Reserve (Fed) decided to keep interest rates on hold. This was Chairman Jerome Powell's last meeting as head of the Fed.

items.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average bounces from 48,700 lows as post-Fed markets recover
items.summary: Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) futures dropped close to 0.70% on Wednesday, falling from a session high near 49,250 to a fresh session low around 48,700 during Powell's press conference before staging a sharp final-hour recovery that returned price to trade close to 48,790.

items.title: XAU/USD slips back as the post-Powell bounce fades
items.summary: XAU/USD declined around 1.6% on Wednesday, falling from a session high near $4,610 to a session low of about $4,510 around the FOMC decision, then recovering to roughly $4,565 during Jerome Powell's press conference before slipping back to retest the $4,520 area and currently trading close to $4,534

items.title: PHP: BSP starts new hiking cycle – Commerzbank
items.summary: Commerzbank highlights that BSP raised its policy rate by 25bp to 4.50%, signalling the start of a new tightening cycle to anchor inflation expectations.

items.title: PBoC: Steepening bias as industrial activity holds – DBS
items.summary: DBS Group Research economist Samuel Tse analyses recent steepening in Chinese Yuan (CNY) rates, linking it to a ceasefire between the United States (US) and Iran and stronger-than-expected Q1 growth in China.

items.title: PHP: BSP tightening supports Peso but risks linger – OCBC
items.summary: OCBC strategists Sim Moh Siong and Christopher Wong note the central bank of Philippines Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas' (BSP) 25bp hike to 4.5% and guidance that further increases are possible as inflation forecasts are revised higher and second-round effects emerge.

items.title: NZD/USD rises as US Dollar weakens on renewed US-Iran talks hopes
items.summary: The New Zealand Dollar (NZD) gains traction against the US Dollar (USD) on Friday as the Greenback weakens amid renewed hopes for US–Iran talks after stalled negotiations.
